why_this_pattern_exists: Distinct numbered points often contain distinct rulings or arguments.
main_benefit: High granularity when content truly differs.
main_risk: If applied blindly, numbering becomes the false criterion.

why_this_pattern_exists: The point sentence and its continuation often answer one question together.
main_risk: Can still miss surrounding list reassurance if extracted cold.

why_this_pattern_exists: List-level cohesion may tempt a global merge.
main_risk: Merges different rulings simply because they share a list.

why_this_pattern_exists: A point may legitimately belong under more than one leaf because of multiple functions.
main_benefit: Preserves all real roles of the text.
main_risk: Uncontrolled duplication if not grounded in function analysis.

why_this_pattern_exists: Numbered extraction raises reassurance questions about previous/next points and list intro.
main_risk: Could become a crutch if used instead of better excerpting.
